mapper.sql: ID, LISTENER_NAME, LISTENER_STATUS, LISTENER_TYPE_CODE, LISTENER_TYPE_NAME, LISTENER_EVENT_CODE, LISTENER_EVENT_NAME, LISTENER_VALUE_TYPE_CODE, LISTENER_VALUE_TYPE_NAME, LISTENER_VALUE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BPM_PROCESS_LISTENER (ID, LISTENER_NAME, LISTENER_STATUS, LISTENER_TYPE_CODE, LISTENER_TYPE_NAME, LISTENER_EVENT_CODE, LISTENER_EVENT_NAME, LISTENER_VALUE_TYPE_CODE, LISTENER_VALUE_TYPE_NAME, LISTENER_VALUE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{listenerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerStatus, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{listenerTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerEventCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerEventName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerValueTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerValueTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{listenerValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE BPM_PROCESS_LISTENER SET LISTENER_NAME = #{listenerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_STATUS = #{listenerStatus, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, LISTENER_TYPE_CODE = #{listenerTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_TYPE_NAME = #{listenerTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_EVENT_CODE = #{listenerEventCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_EVENT_NAME = #{listenerEventName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_VALUE_TYPE_CODE = #{listenerValueTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_VALUE_TYPE_NAME = #{listenerValueTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LISTENER_VALUE = #{listenerValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BPM_PROCESS_LISTENER WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT a1.ID_ as id, a1.NAME_ as name, a1.CATEGORY_ as catagory, a1.KEY_ as key -- a3.BYTES_ as bpmnXml FROM ACT_RE_MODEL a1 -- LEFT JOIN ( -- -- 窗口函数：按KEY_分组，TIME_降序排序，取每组第一条 -- SELECT -- ID_, -- KEY_, -- DEPLOY_TIME_, -- ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY KEY_ ORDER BY DEPLOY_TIME_ DESC) AS rn -- FROM ACT_RE_DEPLOYMENT -- ) a2 ON a1.KEY_ = a2.KEY_ AND a2.rn = 1 -- LEFT JOIN ACT_GE_BYTEARRAY a3 on a2.ID_ = a3.DEPLOYMENT_ID_ and a3.GENERATED_ = '0'
